title: aspidium propinquum
intro: Aspidium propinquum, also known as the maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Aspidium. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Aspidium propinquum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
